extract: Chimecho (Japanese: チリーン Chirean) is a Psychic-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It evolves from Chingling when leveled up with high friendship during the night. Chimecho can Mega Evolve into Mega Chimecho using the Chimechite. Mega Chimecho was introduced in the Mega Dimension DLC for Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
